_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct shaping activities in order to scope and execute red team operations.
reference_document_element_description: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-002 (OP, cosine: 0.462), RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.448).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.463). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [activities, conduct, execute, operations, order, red] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.878, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Conduct shaping activities in order to scope and execute red team operations." and "Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared object" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.520 > STS 0.463 (gap +0.057). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.6%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [activities, conduct, execute, operations, order, red]. WIDAI terms: [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing].
